title: Oculus of Silence
description: Oculus of Silence is a magical survival artifact that repels nearby hostile mobs for 30 seconds
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/471490da996d9bb6f3086515c84eee9541b02b3d_0.webp)

A Moment of Absolute Silence.

Oculus of Silence is a mystical artifact that grants its wielder temporary sanctuary from hostile creatures.

Right-click to activate the eye and unleash a wave of silent force that repels nearby hostile mobs, pushing them away from you for a limited time.

**While active:**

🕒 A visible countdown timer appears (seconds remaining).

👁️ Hostile mobs within a 6-block radius are continuously pushed away.

🟢 Timer color shifts from green → yellow → red as time runs out.

⏳ Duration: 30 seconds

❄️ Cooldown: 60 seconds

When the effect ends, the silence fades… and the world becomes dangerous once more.

⚔️ **Features**

- Right-click activation
- Repels nearby hostile mobs in real time
- 30-second active duration
- 60-second balanced cooldown
- Clear on-screen countdown
- Survival-friendly and non-OP
- Lightweight and optimized

🎮 **How It Works**

Hold the Oculus of Silence in your hand.

Right-click to activate.

Watch the timer tick down.

Use the precious seconds wisely.

Perfect for:

Hardcore survival

Emergency escapes

Dungeon runs

Adventure modpacks


🧩 **Technical Details**

Radius: 6 blocks

Effect type: Continuous directional knockback

Does not damage mobs

Single-stack item

Designed for balanced gameplay
